w:r.w:t: Complete Development Plan — by 10x Digital Ventures

Agency SaaS Billing System ek aisa module hai jo tumhare existing GoPayFast Connect app mein add hoga. Iske zariye tum apne GHL sub-account clients se monthly/yearly subscription fee lo ge — GoPayFast ke zariye. Payment nahi aya toh sub-account ka access automatically suspend ho jayega.
Client GHL sub-account install karta hai
14 din free trial shuru hoti hai
Trial khatam hone se 3 din pehle reminder email
Client plan choose karta hai → GoPayFast subscription shuru
Har mahine auto-charge → Success = access jari raha
Payment fail → Grace period 3 din → Phir suspend
Client pay kare → Turant access restore
Ye plans tum apni marzi se change kar sakte ho. DB mein ek plans table hogi jahan se manage ho ga.
Naye Database Tables — Kya Banana Padega
id, name, price_monthly, price_yearly, max_locations, features (JSON), is_active, trial_days
Plans define karta hai — Starter, Growth, Agency etc.
id, location_id, plan_id, status (trial/active/suspended/cancelled), trial_ends_at, current_period_start, current_period_end, gopayfast_token, amount, cancel_at, created_at
Har location ka subscription status track karta hai
id, location_id, plan_id, amount, status (paid/failed/pending), payment_id, period_start, period_end, created_at
Agency billing invoices — har mahine ki payment record
id, merchant_id, merchant_key, passphrase, environment, grace_period_days, trial_days, notify_email, updated_at
Agency ke apne GoPayFast credentials — billing ke liye alag account
Public ya install ke baad dikhe — plan choose karne ka page
Naye install hone wale clients + trial expire hone wale
Install ke baad automatically, ya trial expire hone pe
3-4 plan cards — naam, price, features, CTA button
Monthly / Yearly toggle (yearly mein 2 mahine free)
Plan select karte hi GoPayFast subscription start ho
Protected — client apna subscription manage kare
Install hue clients — apna plan aur invoices dekhne ke liye
Settings ke neeche "Billing" link add hoga
Current plan badge — naam, price, status (Active/Trial/Suspended)
Trial countdown — "X din bacha hai trial mein"
Billing history table — date, amount, status, download receipt
Automatic redirect — payment fail hone pe dikhe
Woh clients jinka payment fail hua aur grace period khatam
Middleware automatically yahan redirect karta hai
Reason batao — payment fail / trial khatam
"Pay Now" button — GoPayFast pe le jaye
Account data safe hai — payment ke baad restore hoga
Internal — tum apne sab clients ki billing dekhو
ADMIN_SECRET env variable se protect hoga
All locations list — naam, plan, status, last payment
Manually suspend ya reactivate karo kisi ko
Override plan — free mein upgrade do kisi ko
Search by location ID ya naam
Sab active plans load karo — pricing page ke liye
Plan subscribe karo — GoPayFast subscription create karo, location_subscriptions mein save karo
Current location ka subscription status check karo (trial/active/suspended)
Subscription cancel karo — GoPayFast token cancel + DB update
Plan upgrade/downgrade karo — amount adjust karo
Is location ki sab billing invoices
GoPayFast billing ITN webhook — payment success/fail handle karo, subscription renew karo
Admin: sab locations ki billing info (secret protected)

checkSubscription(locationId) — active hai ya nahi startTrial(locationId, planId) — trial shuru karo createSubscription() — GoPayFast subscription create suspendLocation() — access revoke reactivateLocation() — access restore getBillingStatus() — full status return karo
Agency ke apne GoPayFast credentials use karo (alag from client credentials) createAgencySubscription() — billing ke liye cancelAgencySubscription() — cancel ke liye
Har protected route pe checkSubscription() call karo Suspended hai toh /billing/suspended redirect karo Billing pages ko bypass karo (infinite loop se bachne ke liye)
Ye sab phases mein karna hai — sequence follow karo:
agency_plans, location_subscriptions, billing_invoices, agency_settings — 4 naye tables banao. Default plans insert karo.
checkSubscription(), startTrial(), suspendLocation(), reactivateLocation() functions banao. Ye sab baaki chezon ka base hain.
middleware.ts update karo — har request pe subscription check karo. /billing/* routes ko bypass karo.
Sab 12 API routes banao — plans, subscribe, status, cancel, admin, ITN webhook.
Agency ke alag GoPayFast account se recurring subscription create karna — lib/agency-payfast.ts
/api/billing/itn — GoPayFast se payment confirm hone pe subscription renew karo, fail pe suspend karo
Trial ending, payment failed, suspended, reactivated emails bhejo (via nodemailer)
GoPayFast sandbox se end-to-end test karo — trial → payment → fail → suspend → pay → restore
Sidebar Updates — Kya Add Karna Hai
"Billing" link add karo — Settings ke neeche. Subscription status badge dikhe (Active/Trial/X days left)
Alag admin sidebar — Billing Overview, All Locations, Settings, Revenue Report
OAuth callback ke baad automatically trial shuru karo (startTrial() call karo) phir /billing/plans redirect karo
Trial chal raha hai toh yellow banner dikhe — "X din bacha hai, plan choose karo"
Payment fail hone pe red banner har page pe dikhe — "Account suspended, pay karo"
1. Client Account — Client apna use karta hai apni payments ke liye (already settings mein save hota hai)
2. Agency Account (10x Digital Ventures) — Tumhara apna GoPayFast account jisse tum clients se fee lo
Agency account ki credentials agency_settings table mein save hongi — client ki settings se bilkul alag.
Tumhara 10x Digital Ventures GoPayFast account ID — agency_settings table mein save karo
payfast.10xdigitalventures.com/api/billing/itn — is URL ko tumhare GoPayFast account mein daalo
GoPayFast subscription = monthly auto-charge. Token save hoga location_subscriptions mein
GoPayFast Connect — Agency SaaS Billing Plan
